case_title: IAN VINH PHAN VS. STARLITE ELECTRIC INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHAN, IAN VINH AS TO DEFENDANT STARLITE ELECTRIC INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BA ALERT SYSTEMS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
